hero.subtitle: Describe what you ate. Intake does the math.

problem.description: Most trackers force you to search databases, pick portions, and tap through endless screens. You end up counting the app instead of living your day.

tooManyFields.title: Too many fields
tooManyFields.description: Search databases, select portions, adjust serving sizes

tooMuchCounting.title: Too much counting
tooMuchCounting.description: Manual math, endless tracking, constant calculations

solution.title: Intake is different.
solution.description: You describe your meal in plain words. AI parses it and fills in calories and macros. One field, one result. No hunting for foods or portions.

howItWorks.title: Describe → AI analyzes → See your day.
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. No clutter.

describe.title: Describe food
describe.description: Type or say what you ate in your own words.

analyze.title: AI analyzes
analyze.description: Intake recognizes foods and counts calories and macros.

see.title: See your day
see.description: Your daily totals and progress at a glance.

productPreview.title: Your day, at a glance.
productPreview.description: Calories and macros for today. Simple. No dashboard overload.

noManualLogging.title: No manual logging
noManualLogging.description: No searching for foods or tapping through portions. Just describe and go.

aiParsing.title: AI parsing
aiParsing.description: Natural language in, calories and macros out. One field does it all.

dailyClarity.title: Daily clarity
dailyClarity.description: Focus on today. See your intake and how it compares to your goal.

minimalUi.title: Minimal UI
minimalUi.description: Only what you need. No bloat, no gamification, no noise.

cta.title: Start tracking today.
cta.description: Create your account in under a minute. No credit card.
